sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system documentation available for this shmup title

special_mechanics.name: Spell System
special_mechanics.description: Player uses magical spells as primary means of defense. Three main spell types can be acquired: basic energy ball (chargeable), spiritual flame (directional with diagonal variants), and ricocheting spheres (multiply when fully charged)

special_mechanics.name: Screen-Clear Attack
special_mechanics.description: Summons three-headed dragon that destroys all onscreen enemies and projectiles

special_mechanics.name: Charge Mechanic
special_mechanics.description: Spells can be charged for more powerful variants

tier_notes: Tier 2 - empirical/qualitative data only. Mystic Defender is a shmup/action title, not a platformer, so traditional jump physics are not applicable. Movement and gravity parameters are not documented in available sources. Game focuses on spell-based combat mechanics rather than character physics simulation.
